title: iva axillaris var. axillaris
intro: Iva axillaris var. axillaris, also known as marshelder, is a plant species native to the eastern and central United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Iva axillaris var. axillaris include treating skin conditions such as eczema, wounds, and burns, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or salve, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote healing and relieve various health conditions.
